subsidyType: utility-managed replacement program for verified lead or galvanized service lines at no direct cost
publicSideCovered: yes Missouri American Water replaces the company-owned portion as part of the program
privateSideCovered: yes Missouri American Water says verified lead or galvanized service lines are replaced at no direct cost
propertyRules: customers must self-report or request inspection when material is unknown and the service line must be verified as lead or galvanized
contractorRules: Missouri American Water coordinates inspections outreach and replacement scheduling
